indication: TASIGNA (nilotinib) 150 mg and 200 mg capsules are indicated for the treatment of chronic phase (CP) and accelerated phase (AP) Philadelphia chromosome positive chronic myeloid leukemia (Ph+CML) in adult patients resistant to or intolerant of at least one prior therapy including imatinib.
description: Health Canada approved nilotinib for The treatment of chronic phase (CP) and accelerated phase (AP) Philadelphia chromosome positive chronic myeloid leukemia (Ph+CML) in adult patients resistant to or intolerant of at least one prior therapy including imatinib

document.name: Tasigna (nilotinib) [product monograph]. HC.
